title: Surveillance of Giardia infection (giardiasis) - Canada.ca
content:
## Surveillance of Giardia infection (giardiasis)
Learn how Giardia infection is monitored.
- Number of cases of Giardia infection in Canada
- How Canada monitors Giardia infection
- For more information

## Number  of cases of Giardia infection in  Canada
In 2016, there were 3,818 reported cases of giardiasis.

## How Canada monitors Giardia infection
Canada uses different  surveillance systems to monitor cases of food-borne illness. These include:
- National  Enteric Surveillance Program (NESP)
- Canadian Notifiable Disease  Surveillance System
Giardia is a nationally notifiable disease and is reported by all provinces and  territories.
Cases are reported to:
- provincial or territorial departments of health
- the federal government, if they meet the national case definition
- Notifiable diseases online
